name: Codiac
description: Codiac — Developer environment platform for deploying and sharing Kubernetes-based local dev environments as code.

seo.title: Codiac — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Codiac: Codiac — Developer environment platform for deploying and sharing Kubernetes-based local dev environments as code.

when_to_use: Kubernetes-based local dev environments as code
Share reproducible dev environments across the team
Onboard new engineers with a single environment deploy
Preview branch environments in Kubernetes clusters

pros: Shares Kubernetes-based dev environments as code
Consistent environment between local and CI
Reduces 'works on my machine' with real clusters
Snapshot and reset workflows built in
cons: Young product, docs and community sparse
Price and limits not publicly clear
Overkill for simple Node or Python apps
review.verdict: Interesting for K8s-heavy teams but still early — evaluate against DevPod, Gitpod, and Coder first.
review.best_for: Teams already on Kubernetes who want reproducible dev environments across the org.
review.not_for: Small teams or non-K8s stacks where plain Docker Compose suffices.
